title: Resolution Requesting the Local Chief Executive, Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Hold in Abeyance the Issuance of Sanitary Permit of All Funeral Parlors and Other Business Establishments Until Confirmation of Compliance with the Septage Management Ordinance of the Municipality of Los Baños. Councilor Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Ree, Rmp, Mpa 01/16/2023
